summary: Full backend + frontend testing of BMIA Compliance (NSE/BSE/SEBI RAG) feature. 15/15 pytest cases passed on the 5 /api/compliance endpoints. Frontend /compliance page, quick-launch modal, Ctrl+Shift+C shortcut, suggested questions, source toggles, year filter, Ask flow with citation chips + Sources list, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 answer generation all verified end-to-end. The seeded SEBI insider-trading query returned a properly-formatted answer with CIT-1 markers and the SEED-SEBI/HO/ISD/2015/01 source card.
critical_code_review_comments: compliance_agent.py: session_id derived from hash(question) without stable salt — ok for stateless use, but collides easily. Minor.

ComplianceResearchPanel.js: fetch calls to /api/compliance/* do not send the bmia_session_token Authorization header. Currently these endpoints are not auth-gated so it works, but be consistent with the rest of the app (global fetch interceptor in App.js should auto-attach). Verify the global interceptor covers these paths.
compliance_rag.py: ComplianceStore.chunks default mutable None → set in build(); consider `field(default_factory=list)` to avoid None checks.
routes/compliance.py ingest-now: spawns a raw thread with its own pymongo client — fine but bypasses app.db lifecycle. Acceptable for a best-effort trigger.
test_credentials: somnath.dey@smifs.com / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login via POST /api/auth/login, token stored in localStorage key bmia_session_token.
seed_data_creation: Used the 4 pre-seeded circulars (SEED-* circular_nos) already in DB. Called POST /api/compliance/rebuild once in tests to guarantee stores are warm.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Compliance feature is green. Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_compliance.py. Frontend test-ids: compliance-panel, compliance-question-input, compliance-send-btn, source-toggle-{nse|bse|sebi}, year-filter-select, suggested-q-{0..4}, compliance-quicklaunch-btn, compliance-modal, compliance-modal-close, compliance-modal-open-full, citation-chip-CIT-N, citation-CIT-N. Ctrl+Shift+C opens modal. To bypass TOTPGate in tests: POST /api/auth/login then set localStorage['bmia_session_token']=token.
